name: UI/UX Pro Max — Design Intelligence Engine
description: Integrates UI/UX Pro Max design intelligence into HoC. Provides 67 UI styles, 96 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 100 industry reasoning rules, and AI-powered design system generation. Auto-clones the skill repo and auto-detects Python — zero user configuration required.

requirements.notes: Auto-clones skill repo and auto-detects Python 3 on first init. Git and Python 3.8+ must be available on PATH.
